channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: B.C. activists allege abuse after Israeli interception of Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Three activists from British Columbia who were detained after Israeli forces intercepted a Gaza-bound aid flotilla in the Mediterranean Sea have returned to Vancouver and publicly described allegation...

item.title: Gauteng struggles with rising informal settlements as authorities deploy satellite systems to monitor land invasions
item.description: Gauteng province is facing a significant and growing challenge with informal settlements, with official data revealing that there are now more than 860,000 informal structures across the province. Acc...

item.title: The Rare 1959 Cadillac Broadmoor Skyview Sightseeing Limousine and Its Space-Age Design
item.description: The 1959 Cadillac Broadmoor Skyview is a rare and highly distinctive example of mid-20th century American automotive luxury and design innovation. Built by the Superior Coach Corporation, this special...

item.title: Electric vehicle travel initiative launches across the Philippines
item.description: This article announces the launch of an electric vehicle (EV) travel initiative across the Philippines starting today, May 25, 2026. Published under ABS-CBN’s BrandNews section, the piece is identifie...

item.title: A Look at Vanessa Paradis’ Childhood and Early Rise to Fame in France
item.description: The article revisits the childhood and early career of French singer and actress Vanessa Paradis through a collection of vintage photographs from the 1970s and early 1980s. Born on December 22, 1972, ...

item.title: Leyte runner Chrishia Mae Tajarros wins second straight opening gold in Palarong Pambansa 2026
item.description: Leyte’s Chrishia Mae Tajarros once again made history in the Palarong Pambansa as she secured the first gold medal of the 2026 edition, defending her title in the secondary girls’ 3,000-meter run. Com...

item.title: Concerns over governance and economic strain in Kenya amid unmet promises
item.description: The opinion piece reflects growing frustration among many Kenyans over governance, economic pressure, and what is seen as unfulfilled political promises. The writer paints a picture of a country strug...

item.title: Tiffany Trump and family share images from Donald Trump Jr and Bettina Anderson’s private Bahamas wedding celebrations
item.description: Tiffany Trump offered followers a glimpse into the private Bahamas wedding celebrations of her brother, Donald Trump Jr, and his new wife, Bettina Anderson. Through a series of Instagram posts, Tiffan...

item.description: A captain attached to the South African Police Service (SAPS) Forensic Science Laboratory is expected to appear before the Pretoria Magistrate’s Court on Monday following his arrest on charges of defe...

item.title: Pakistan plans dedicated WAPDA Security Force to protect water infrastructure and project sites
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has decided to establish a specialised security formation named the WAPDA Security Force to safeguard major water infrastructure projects across the country, including dams,...

item.title: Grave of Former Aparri Vice Mayor Vandalized and Looted
item.description: The grave of a former vice mayor in Aparri, Cagayan was reported to have been vandalized and robbed, according to a news report published on May 25, 2026. The incident involved the destruction of the ...

item.title: Superpretzel releases star-shaped patriotic pretzels for America 250 celebrations
item.description: Superpretzel, the well-known stadium pretzel brand, is launching a limited-edition product to commemorate America's 250th anniversary celebrations. The company is introducing star-shaped pretzels insp...

item.title: School teacher Grace Litimba wins Sh400 million in SportPesa Aviator game
item.description: SportPesa has announced Grace George Litimba as Tanzania’s first female major Aviator winner after she won Sh400 million through the Aviator game. According to the company, the win is currently the bi...

item.title: ED probe reveals Rs 6,000 crore Ponzi scam targeting Muslim investors through Sharia-compliant promises
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has uncovered a massive Ponzi-style investment scam allegedly masterminded by Hyderabad-based Nowhera Shaik, in which investors were promised unusually high returns un...

item.title: Kevin Warsh inherits a challenging Federal Reserve amid inflation pressures and political tensions
item.description: The article examines the difficult position facing Kevin Warsh as he takes over the chair of the US Federal Reserve from Jerome Powell, in a politically charged and economically complex environment sh...

item.title: Supreme Court petition seeks investigation into viral Cockroach Janta Party movement and alleged fake law degree network

item.title: Celebrities react to Oyo school abduction as insecurity worsens in Nigeria
item.description: Several Nollywood actors and public figures have reacted strongly to the recent kidnapping incident in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State, where armed attackers invaded three schools in the Yaw...

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna appears on Fox News despite Trump criticism and suggests White House meeting

item.title: IIT Madras and IIT Kanpur experts deployed to resolve CBSE post-result portal technical glitches

item.title: Pakistan signals readiness to host another round of US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has expressed optimism that Pakistan may soon host another round of indirect peace talks between the United States and Iran in Islamabad amid reports of progress towards ...
